name: Dumbbell One-Arm Triceps Extension
shortDescription: An isolation exercise for the triceps performed one arm at a time, with a dumbbell overhead.
instructions: Stand or sit holding a dumbbell overhead with one arm fully extended. Lower the dumbbell by bending the elbow, then extend the arm back up to starting position, keeping upper arm still.
steps: Hold dumbbell in one hand, arm extended overhead.
Support upper arm with free hand if needed.
Lower dumbbell behind head by bending the elbow.
Pause when forearm is parallel to ground.
Extend arm fully to return to starting position.
breathing: Inhale as you lower the dumbbell, exhale as you press up.
